articles.title_en: Ukrainian drone strike on Russian port causes fire, toxic smoke as locals fault officials for withholding public health information
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drones struck the oil-loading infrastructure at the port of Tuapse overnight, sparking a large fire after debris fell at the site. The Krasnodar Krai operational headquarters said no one was injured.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian drone strike on Russian port causes fire, toxic smoke as locals fault officials for withholding public health information
articles.lead_raw: Ukrainian drones struck the oil-loading infrastructure at the port of Tuapse overnight, sparking a large fire after debris fell at the site. The Krasnodar Krai operational headquarters said no one was injured.

articles.title_en: Boiling oil spills onto street outside Russian refinery after drone strike ignites storage tank
articles.lead_en: Boiling oil spilled onto a street outside an oil refinery in Tuapse, Krasnodar Krai, after a storage tank boiled over during a fire there on April 28. Alexei Klushin, head of the regional Emergency Situations Ministry office, described the incident to Governor Veniamin Kondratyev in a conversation posted to the governor’s Telegram channel.
articles.title_raw: Boiling oil spills onto street outside Russian refinery after drone strike ignites storage tank
articles.lead_raw: Boiling oil spilled onto a street outside an oil refinery in Tuapse, Krasnodar Krai, after a storage tank boiled over during a fire there on April 28. Alexei Klushin, head of the regional Emergency Situations Ministry office, described the incident to Governor Veniamin Kondratyev in a conversation posted to the governor’s Telegram channel.

articles.title_en: Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil refinery send smoke across Black Sea coast as state of emergency is declared
articles.lead_en: In the early hours of April 28, Ukrainian forces struck the oil infrastructure in Tuapse for the third time in two weeks. The first fire at the oil terminal burned for four days before it was extinguished.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil refinery send smoke across Black Sea coast as state of emergency is declared
articles.lead_raw: In the early hours of April 28, Ukrainian forces struck the oil infrastructure in Tuapse for the third time in two weeks. The first fire at the oil terminal burned for four days before it was extinguished.

articles.title_en: Drone debris sparks fire at Russian oil refinery, prompting evacuation of nearby residents
articles.lead_en: Drone debris struck an oil refinery in Tuapse in the early hours of April 28, setting it on fire, the operational headquarters of Krasnodar Krai reported.
